## Collections.AggregatedResultMap.addMutableCollection() method

Adds a new empty mutable collection with the specified ID.

**Signature:**

```typescript
addMutableCollection(id: string, entries?: Iterable<KeyValueEntry<string, unknown>>): Result<TCOLLECTIONID>;
```
